title: Club Directory
description: NYU Shanghai supports more than two dozen student-led clubs in fields ranging from academics to performance arts to social causes. Whether your interest is cultural or political or social, NYU Shanghai provides opportunities for students with similar interests.
text:
Club Directory
NYU Shanghai supports more than two dozen student-led clubs in fields ranging from academics to performance arts to social causes. Whether your interest is cultural or political or social, NYU Shanghai provides opportunities for students with similar interests.
Alphabetical Club List (Updated Fall 2025)

text_blocks.text: NYU Shanghai supports more than two dozen student-led clubs in fields ranging from academics to performance arts to social causes. Whether your interest is cultural or political or social, NYU Shanghai provides opportunities for students with similar interests.
